mapper.select: select competence from t_account where account = #{account};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account (id, account, password, competence, dormitory) VALUES (#{id}, #{account}, #{password}, #{competence}, #{dormitory})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_account SET dormitory = #{dormitory} WHERE account = #{account}
UPDATE t_account SET password = #{password} WHERE account = #{account}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_maintain (id, content, dormitory, status, updateUser) VALUES (#{id}, #{content}, #{dormitory}, #{status}, #{updateUser})
